scripts.predev: npm run db:generate -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/email && npm run build -w packages/agent && npm run build -w packages/analytics
scripts.lint: npm run lint:structure && npm run lint:repo && npx turbo run lint
scripts.lint:repo: eslint e2e scripts playwright.config.ts playwright.browser.config.ts eslint.config.mjs --max-warnings 0
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:node && npm run test:integration
scripts.verify:pr: npm run lint:structure && npm run lint:repo && npx turbo run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:node && npm run test:e2e:smoke && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
scripts.test:coverage: node ./scripts/test-bootstrap.mjs && npm run test:coverage -w apps/dashboard && npm run test:coverage -w apps/gateway && npm run test:coverage -w packages/agent && npm run test:coverage -w packages/analytics && npm run test:coverage -w packages/email && node ./scripts/check-critical-coverage.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:smoke && npm run test:e2e:browser
scripts.verify:imessage:phase1-preflight: node ./scripts/test-bootstrap.mjs && npm run test:integration -w apps/gateway -- --run src/routes/imessage/message-handler.test.ts src/routes/webhooks-meta-photon.test.ts src/operator-notify.test.ts src/operator-escalation.test.ts src/message-handlers/planning-notifications.test.ts && npm run test:integration -w apps/dashboard -- --run src/app/api/integrations/imessage/bind/route.test.ts
scripts.verify:imessage:phase7: npm run test:unit -w apps/dashboard -- --run src/lib/integrations/imessage-visibility.unit.test.ts src/lib/integrations/catalog.unit.test.ts src/app/\(onboarding\)/onboarding/_components/step-connect.unit.test.tsx && npm run test:integration -w apps/dashboard -- --run src/app/api/product-events/route.test.ts && npm run test:integration -w apps/gateway -- --run src/routes/imessage/binding.test.ts src/routes/imessage/message-handler.test.ts
